meta.document_name: Medical Device Adverse Event / Vigilance Report

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this report documents a reportable event involving {device_name_model} per EU MDR Articles 87–92, 21 CFR 803 (FDA MDR), MHRA Yellow Card, and equivalent regulations as applicable.

sections.title: 3. Device Information
4. Event Description
sections.section_prompt: Guidance template for describing the event: chronology, patient demographics (anonymised), clinical outcome, severity classification (death / serious deterioration / serious public-health threat / other), and immediate clinical actions taken.

sections.title: 5. Manufacturer Investigation Summary
sections.section_prompt: Outline expected content: root cause hypothesis, returned-device analysis results, lot history check, risk re-evaluation against {ref:RD-007}, similar-event search in complaints database.

sections.title: 6. Regulatory Reporting Matrix
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate rows for the markets in scope (EU MDR via Eudamed MIR; FDA via eMDR 3500A; MHRA Yellow Card; Health Canada MDR; Australia TGA IRIS; Japan PMDA). Include statutory deadline (2/10/15 days for EU; 30 days FDA; etc.). Leave submitted/reference blank for completion. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 7. Follow-Up & FSCA Decision
sections.section_prompt: Describe the periodic follow-up (initial, follow-up, final) and link to FSCA assessment in {ref:CA-006} and CAPA in {ref:CA-001} if applicable.

output_config.footer: CONFIDENTIAL — Controlled Record | EU MDR Art. 87 / 21 CFR 803
